title: neocheiropteris subhemionitidea
intro: Neocheiropteris subhemionitidea, also known as the Korean Royal Fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its unique sub-hemionitidean type frond. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Neocheiropteris subhemionitidea include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce oxidative stress, and even exhibit anticancer properties, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, or as a component of herbal extracts, often combined with other medicinal plants to enhance its therapeutic effects.
